name: K-Ci & JoJo
bio: K-Ci & JoJo has a durable r&b catalog that continues to attract listeners through streaming, playlists, and replay value.
notable_for: K-Ci & JoJo remains closely associated with All My Life and Tell Me It's Real, which still anchor attention around the catalog.
career_highlight: Songs like All My Life and Tell Me It's Real still help define the catalog's long-tail earnings profile.
revenue_drivers: Repeat streaming and playlist familiarity help the biggest songs keep earning after release.
Broad recognition supports social reuse, rediscovery, and steady catalog listening.
Licensing and event-driven playback can create recurring spikes.
